theme_and_archetype.archetype: Archetype 1: Organic & Earthy (Customized with Mexican warmth)
theme_and_archetype.rationale: Patients/Customers need warmth and appetite stimulation. Dark UI feels cold and clinical. We use a clean white base for hygiene and modernity, offset by rich, smoky food colors (Burnt Orange, Paprika Red) and a vibrant Fresh Green for CTAs (WhatsApp/Phone) to signal 'Go/Easy'.

typography.rules: Never use Inter. Headings use Playfair Display for an authentic, premium, traditional feel. Body uses Manrope for crystal clear mobile readability. Apply 'tracking-tight' to all headings above 32px.

spacing_and_layout.system: Tailwind standard (p-4, p-6, p-8, p-12). Generous padding for breathing room.
spacing_and_layout.mobile_first: Crucial. 90% traffic is mobile. Ensure touch targets are at least 48px high. Stack columns vertically on mobile (grid-cols-1) and expand to grid-cols-2 or grid-cols-3 on md/lg.
spacing_and_layout.hero_strategy: Mobile: Image at top with a soft gradient fade into the white background, text layered below or overlapping. Desktop: 50/50 split (Text left, large Image right) OR full-width cinematic image with bg-black/40 overlay. For this authentic feel, use the Full-Width Cinematic Hero with overlaid text.

buttons.primary: bg-[#25D366] text-white hover:bg-[#1EBA57] rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all shadow-lg hover:shadow-xl hover:-translate-y-0.5 flex items-center justify-center gap-2
buttons.secondary: bg-white text-[#1C1917] border-2 border-[#1C1917] hover:bg-[#1C1917] hover:text-white rounded-full px-8 py-4 font-bold transition-all flex items-center justify-center gap-2

cards.menu_item: bg-white rounded-2xl overflow-hidden border border-[#E7E5E4] shadow-sm hover:shadow-md transition-shadow duration-300

floating_whatsapp.button: bg-[#25D366] text-white w-14 h-14 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center shadow-[0_8px_32px_rgba(37,211,102,0.4)] hover:scale-110 transition-transform duration-300

navigation.wrapper: fixed top-0 left-0 right-0 z-50 backdrop-blur-xl bg-white/90 border-b border-[#E7E5E4] transition-all

hero_grill.description: High-quality shot of chicken cooking on a smoking grill. Use as Hero background with a dark overlay (bg-black/50) so the white Playfair Display text is legible.

menu_grilled_chicken.description: Grilled chicken combo. Use in Menu Highlights card 1.

menu_fried_chicken.description: Crispy fried chicken. Use in Menu Highlights card 2.

menu_tacos.description: Authentic Carne Asada tacos. Use in Menu Highlights card 3.

icons.usage: Use Phosphor Icons (weight: 'fill' for stars/socials, 'regular' for UI elements). Required icons: WhatsappLogo, PhoneCall, Star, MapPin, Clock, Fire, ForkKnife.

hero.h1: El auténtico sabor de la parrilla en Guadalupe

menu_highlights.cta: Ver Menú Completo y Ordenar (Centered below grid)

testimonials.layout: Horizontal scroll on mobile, 3-column grid on desktop.
testimonials.content: Must include 5 stars (Burnt Orange color) and mention local customers like 'Mary Guzmán'.

footer_and_contact.layout: 2 columns. Left: Contact info (Address, Phone, Hours). Right: Google Maps Embed.
footer_and_contact.interactive: Phone numbers must use 'tel:' links. Address should link to Google Maps directions.

accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements (buttons, links, form inputs if any) MUST have a 'data-testid' attribute (e.g., data-testid='hero-whatsapp-btn').
accessibility_and_testing.a11y: Ensure proper aria-labels on icon-only buttons (like the floating WhatsApp button). Maintain high contrast for text over images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Update Tailwind config to include the brand colors and typography defined above.
Add Google Fonts imports for 'Playfair Display' and 'Manrope' to index.css.
Build the page mobile-first. Ensure all buttons are highly tappable.
Use the exact image URLs provided in the media section. Do not use placeholders.
Ensure the floating WhatsApp button stays fixed at the bottom right and has a pulsing or bouncing animation to draw attention.
Create the sticky navigation bar using Glassmorphism as described in components.navigation.
Implement the full-width Hero with a background image, a dark overlay for text readability, and the two CTAs clearly visible.
